addComponentPropertyListener.signature: bool addComponentPropertyListener(var object, var propertyList, var metadata, var optionalFunction)
addComponentPropertyListener.description: Adds a listener that sets the properties of the given components when the broadcaster receives a message.

addComponentRefreshListener.signature: bool addComponentRefreshListener(var componentIds, String refreshType, var metadata)
addComponentRefreshListener.description: Adds a listener that will cause a refresh message (eg. repaint(), changed()) to be send out to the given components.

addComponentValueListener.signature: bool addComponentValueListener(var object, var metadata, var optionalFunction)
addComponentValueListener.description: Adds a listener that sets the value of the given components when the broadcaster receives a message.

addDelayedListener.signature: bool addDelayedListener(int delayInMilliSeconds, var obj, var metadata, var function)
addDelayedListener.description: Adds a listener that will be executed with a delay.

addListener.signature: bool addListener(var object, var metadata, var function)
addListener.description: Adds a listener that is notified when a message is send. The object can be either a JSON object, a script object or a simple string.

addModuleParameterSyncer.signature: bool addModuleParameterSyncer(String moduleId, var parameterIndex, var metadata)
addModuleParameterSyncer.description: Adds a listener that will sync module parameters from the attached module parameter source.

attachToComplexData.signature: void attachToComplexData(String dataTypeAndEvent, var moduleIds, var dataIndexes, var optionalMetadata)
attachToComplexData.description: Registers this broadcaster to be notified when a complex data object changes.

attachToComponentMouseEvents.signature: void attachToComponentMouseEvents(var componentIds, var callbackLevel, var optionalMetadata)
attachToComponentMouseEvents.description: Registers this broadcaster to be notified for mouse events for the given components.

attachToComponentProperties.signature: void attachToComponentProperties(var componentIds, var propertyIds, var optionalMetadata)
attachToComponentProperties.description: Registers this broadcaster to be called when one of the properties of the given components change.

attachToComponentValue.description: Registers this broadcaster to be called when the value of the given components change.

attachToComponentVisibility.description: Registers this broadcaster to be called when the visibility of one of the components (or one of its parent component) changes.

attachToContextMenu.signature: void attachToContextMenu(var componentIds, var stateFunction, var itemList, var optionalMetadata, var useLeftClick)
attachToContextMenu.description: Registers this broadcaster to be notified when a context menu item from the given components was selected.

attachToEqEvents.signature: void attachToEqEvents(var moduleIds, var eventTypes, var optionalMetadata)
attachToEqEvents.description: Registers this broadcaster to be notified about changes to the EQ (adding / removing / selecting filter bands).

attachToInterfaceSize.description: Registers the broadcaster to be notified when the interface size changes.

attachToModuleParameter.signature: void attachToModuleParameter(var moduleIds, var parameterIds, var optionalMetadata)
attachToModuleParameter.description: Registers this broadcaster to be notified when a module parameter changes.

attachToNonRealtimeChange.description: Attaches this broadcaster to receive realtime / nonrealtime render change events.

attachToOtherBroadcaster.signature: void attachToOtherBroadcaster(var otherBroadcaster, var argTransformFunction, bool async, var optionalMetadata)
attachToOtherBroadcaster.description: Attaches this broadcaster to another broadcaster(s) to forward the messages.

attachToProcessingSpecs.description: Attaches this broadcaster to changes of the audio processing specs (samplerate / buffer size).

attachToRadioGroup.description: Registers this broadcaster to be notified when a button of a radio group is clicked.

attachToRoutingMatrix.description: Attaches this broadcaster to a routing matrix and listens for changes.

attachToSampleMap.signature: void attachToSampleMap(var samplerIds, var eventTypes, var optionalMetadata)
attachToSampleMap.description: Attaches the broadcaster to events of a samplemap (loading, changing, adding samples).

callWithDelay.signature: void callWithDelay(int delayInMilliseconds, var argArray, var function)
callWithDelay.description: Calls a function after a short period of time. This is exclusive, so if you pass in a new function while another is pending, the first will be replaced.

isBypassed.description: Checks if the broadcaster is bypassed.

refreshContextMenuState.description: If this broadcaster is attached to a context menu, calling this method will update the states for the menu items.

removeListener.description: Removes the listener that was assigned with the given object.

removeSource.description: Removes the source with the given metadata.

sendAsyncMessage.description: Sends an asynchronous message to all listeners. the length of args must match the default value list.

sendMessageWithDelay.description: Sends a message to all listeners with a delay.

sendSyncMessage.description: Sends a synchronous message to all listeners (same as the dot assignment operator). the length of args must match the default value list.

setBypassed.signature: void setBypassed(bool shouldBeBypassed, bool sendMessageIfEnabled, bool async)
setBypassed.description: Deactivates the broadcaster so that it will not send messages. If sendMessageIfEnabled is true, it will send the last value when unbypassed.

setEnableQueue.description: If this is enabled, the broadcaster will keep an internal queue of all messages and will guarantee to send them all.

setForceSynchronousExecution.description: Forces every message to be sent synchronously.

setRealtimeMode.description: Guarantees that the synchronous execution of the listener callbacks can be called from the audio thread.

setReplaceThisReference.description: This will control whether the `this` reference for the listener function will be replaced with the object passed into `addListener`.

setSendMessageForUndefinedArgs.description: Forces the broadcaster to also send a message when a parameter is undefined.
